channel.title: Healthy Eating on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Healthy Eating on MinWeb

item.title: What Nutritionists Actually Order at McDonald’s
item.description: Curious what registered dietitians actually eat at McDonald's? Discover the simple, strategic hacks they use to order smarter fuel without the nutritional...

item.title: The Truth About Ultra-Processed Foods and Your Health
item.description: Discover how ultra-processed foods impact your health and learn to identify these industrial products using the NOVA classification system for better nutrition.

item.title: Why Nutrition Misinformation Is Everywhere (And How to Cope)
item.description: Learn why nutrition misinformation is everywhere and discover practical, science-backed strategies to filter out the noise and make truly healthy choices.

item.title: Why You’re Confused About Nutrition: It’s Not Your Fault
item.description: Stop feeling guilty about your confusion in the grocery aisle; discover how manipulative wellness propaganda and social media algorithms drive your frustration.

item.title: Why Beans Are the Most Underrated Superfood
item.description: Discover why beans are nature’s most underrated superfood, providing essential protein, fiber, and longevity benefits that can transform your daily nutrition.
